query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 13 
WHERE categoryId != 13 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%cervejaria%' OR name LIKE '%Cervejaria%'
    OR name LIKE '%cervejas artesanais%' OR name LIKE '%Cervejas Artesanais%'
    OR name LIKE '%cerveja artesanal%' OR name LIKE '%Cerveja Artesanal%'
    OR name LIKE '%brewery%' OR name LIKE '%Brewery%'
    OR name LIKE '%brewpub%' OR name LIKE '%Brewpub%' OR name LIKE '%BrewPub%'
    OR name LIKE '%brew house%' OR name LIKE '%Brew House%'
    OR name LIKE '%taphouse%' OR name LIKE '%Tap House%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 13 
WHERE categoryId != 13 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%cervejaria%' OR name LIKE '%Cervejaria%'
    OR name LIKE '%cervejas artesanais%' OR name LIKE '%Cervejas Artesanais%'
    OR name LIKE '%cerveja artesanal%' OR name LIKE '%Cerveja Artesanal%'
    OR name LIKE '%brewery%' OR name LIKE '%Brewery%'
    OR name LIKE '%brewpub%' OR name LIKE '%Brewpub%' OR name LIKE '%BrewPub%'
    OR name LIKE '%brew house%' OR name LIKE '%Brew House%'
    OR name LIKE '%taphouse%' OR name LIKE '%Tap House%');
